data.title: Registration is open for Wellness Workdays' 13th Annual Conference, offering measurable workplace wellness programs to reduce healthcare costs and improve productivity.
data.description: In Boston on January 29, 2026, Wellness Workdays, a prominent company offering workplace wellness programs resulting in measurable reductions in healthcare costs and enhanced employee productivity, has announced the opening of registration for its 13th Annual event.

data.title: Jordan's Ministry of Education launches national literacy initiative with Amira Learning, aiming to improve primary school education.
data.description: Three major educational organizations, Amira Learning, Carter Education Group, and NorthStar Education, have joined forces with Jordan to introduce an innovative literacy program for primary schools. The program utilizes advanced AI learning technology to enhance educational outcomes. The partnership was launched in Amman, Jordan on January 29, 2026. This collaboration aims to revolutionize primary education by leveraging the power of agentic AI learning.

data.title: PKF O'Connor Davies releases 2026 Long Island Economic Survey showing cautious optimism among business leaders and tech efficiency gains.
data.description: A recent annual study conducted by the Siena Research Institute uncovered a sense of cautious optimism among business leaders in Long Island. The study, released on January 29, 2026, highlighted an increasing trend in the adoption of technology by businesses in the region to enhance efficiency. PKF O'Connor Davies, a prominent accounting, tax, and advisory firm, facilitated the study. The findings indicate a growing reliance on technological tools to drive productivity and streamline operations. Business leaders are cautiously optimistic about future prospects, with a focus on leveraging technology for sustainable growth. The study reflects a shift towards modernization and innovation within the Long Island business community, showcasing the importance of embracing digital solutions.

data.title: Bybit will introduce 'My Bank' for IBAN fiat-crypto transfers in February to ease consumer fund transfers to exchanges.
data.description: The newly launched retail banking product is designed to streamline the process for consumers looking to transfer funds to crypto exchanges, with the goal of reducing any barriers or challenges they may face in this transaction process. This initiative seeks to improve the overall user experience by providing a more efficient and seamless method for sending funds to crypto exchanges, ultimately making it easier for individuals to engage in crypto trading.

data.title: Biz2X and BCG unveil report on small business finance at conference in Miami, combining real-time data with industry insights.
data.description: A report co-authored by Biz2X and Boston Consulting Group (BCG) was launched at the Biz2X Frontiers conference in Miami. The report, titled "Urgency and Opportunity: The Next Chapter in Small Business Finance," combines real-time small business data with BCG’s macro and industry insights. Biz2X, a global SaaS platform facilitating AI-driven small business lending, shared the analysis today at the conference. This collaboration aims to provide better understanding of cash flow and enhance AI-based credit decisions for both banks and non-banks.

data.title: Embry-Riddle appoints Joe Gibney as Dean of the David B. O'Maley College of Business at Daytona Beach Campus starting March 2, 2026.
data.description: In January 29, 2026, in Daytona Beach, Florida, Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University announced the appointment of Joe Gibney as the new dean of the David B. O'Maley College of Business at its Daytona Beach Campus, starting his role on March 2, 2026. Gibney is a respected aviation industry veteran recognized for his leadership in driving strategic growth initiatives. This appointment signifies the university's commitment to enhancing business education, with Gibney bringing over [numerical value] years of experience to the role.

data.title: Lou Malnati's is selling heart-shaped pizzas in February with $1 per pizza going to Make-A-Wish chapters, celebrating wish children.
data.description: Throughout the month of February in Chicago, Lou Malnati's deep-dish pizzeria is bringing back their popular tradition of offering heart-shaped pizzas. For every heart-shaped pizza sold, the pizzeria will donate $1 to charity. Additionally, special celebrations will be held for wish children as part of this initiative. This charitable effort aims to support the community while providing a delicious treat for customers.

data.title: Kyvos recognized in Gartner report for Analytics & Business Intelligence on Jan 29, 2026. Leading semantic layer for AI/BI.
data.description: A California-based company, Kyvos, known for its advanced semantic layer for AI and BI, was featured in the Gartner® Reference Architecture Brief: Analytics & Business Intelligence (ABI) released on January 29, 2026. The report acknowledges Kyvos's leading position in the industry. As analytics applications expand within businesses, the brief emphasizes the significance of leveraging advanced tools like those offered by Kyvos.

data.title: 2026 State of the Game Industry Report from GDC Festival of Gaming unveils insights on industry trends.
data.description: GDC Festival of Gaming held in San Francisco has unveiled the findings of the 2026 State of the Game Industry Survey. The survey provides valuable insights into crucial industry trends for the coming year.

data.title: Boats Group and United Yacht Sales extend partnership through 2027, showcasing commitment to broker success.
data.description: Boats Group, a prominent player in online marketplaces for boat transactions, revealed today the continuation of its partnership with United Yacht Sales, a move that solidifies their longstanding collaboration until the conclusion of 2027. The extended agreement, spanning multiple years, highlights the mutual commitment between the two entities.

data.title: AstraZeneca invests $15 billion in China till 2030 to boost manufacturing and R&D, strengthening UK collaborations. CEO calls it a landmark move.
data.description: AstraZeneca Plc has announced a significant investment of $15 billion in China by 2030 to expand medicines manufacturing and research and development. This follows a previous announcement in July 2025 of a $50 billion investment in the U.S. to address Trump tariffs. The investment in China, revealed during a visit by the UK Prime Minister, aims to strengthen collaboration in healthcare innovation between China and the UK, benefiting the life sciences ecosystems of both countries. UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer noted that AstraZeneca's expansion in China will support the growth of the British manufacturer and thousands of jobs in the UK. AstraZeneca CEO, Pascal Soriot, described the investment as the beginning of an exciting new phase for the company in China, focusing on advancements in cell therapy and radioconjugates. This development is set to boost research and development in the UK's life sciences sector, with partnerships established with leading universities in the country. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Liftoff Mobile, Inc. announced the launch of its IPO, aiming to raise funding through global investors.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, on January 29, 2026, Liftoff Mobile, Inc. revealed the commencement of its roadshow for its upcoming initial public offering of common stock. Liftoff, known for its expertise in performance marketing and monetization solutions for mobile apps worldwide, is taking steps towards offering its shares to the public for the first time. This move signifies a significant milestone for Liftoff as it aims to enter the public market and expand its reach.

data.title: Subsea7's Seaway7 awarded substantial contract by OWP Gennaker for Germany's Gennaker offshore wind farm.
data.description: Luxembourg, 29 January 2026 - Subsea 7 S.A. disclosed today that Seaway7, a division of the Subsea7 Group, has secured a significant contract for the Gennaker offshore wind farm in Germany. This contract, awarded by OWP Gennaker under Skyborn Renewables, is valued at over 1 million and marks a notable achievement for Subsea7.
